intro: Take flight as a small owl, exploring mystical woods and restoring life through ancient magic.
description:
Begin a heartfelt journey through enchanted forests where magic lingers in every branch and shadow. As a small owl guided by gentle spirits, you soar above glowing marshes, whispering trees, and ancient groves. Your purpose is to restore balance by flying through magical circles that awaken plants, revive wildlife, and breathe life back into forgotten woodlands.
Along your journey, you will find memory shards hidden beneath canopies, inside hollow trees, or deep within misty swamps. These fragments reveal the long-lost past and help you uncover your true mission. Collect enough of them, and new regions of the forest open before you—each with its own atmosphere, story, and mysteries.
At the start of each level, you are introduced to the history and significance of the land you are about to explore. Spirits may call to you as you glide, offering guidance, sharing memories, or asking for your help. Your adventure is one of gentle exploration and quiet discovery, woven together by the wisdom of the forest and the echoes of an ancient story.
